# Single table with multi column vindex
"select col1 from tabfoo where (col2,col3) = (1,2)"
{
  "QueryType": "SELECT",
  "Original": "select col1 from tabfoo where (col2,col3) = (1,2)",
  "Instructions": {
    "OperatorType": "Route",
    "Variant": "SelectEqualUnique",
    "Keyspace": {
      "Name": "user",
      "Sharded": true
    },
    "FieldQuery": "select col1 from tabfoo where 1 != 1",
    "MultiValues": [[1,2]],
    "MultiVindex": "col2_col3_map",
    "Query": "select col1 from tabfoo where (col2, col3) = (1, 2)",
    "Table": "tabfoo",
  },

}

# Single table with multi column vindex
"select col1 from tabfoo where (col2,col3) = (1,null)"
{
  "QueryType": "SELECT",
  "Original": "select col1 from tabfoo where (col2,col3) = (1,null)",
  "Instructions": {
    "OperatorType": "Route",
    "Variant": "SelectNone",
    "Keyspace": {
      "Name": "user",
      "Sharded": true
    },
    "FieldQuery": "select col1 from tabfoo where 1 != 1",
    "Query": "select col1 from tabfoo where (col2, col3) = (1, null)",
    "Table": "tabfoo"
  }
}

//
select col1 from tabfoo where (col2,col3) in ((1,2), (3,4))

"select col1 from tabfoo where col2 = 1 and col3 = 2"
